name: DEMONS
short_description: DEMONS is a card game for 1-4 players. When an evil cult unleashes an ancient demon, all that can stop the coming apocalypse is you, your friends and a deck of cards.
detailed_description:
DEMONS is a card game for 1-4 players. When an evil cult unleashes an ancient demon, all that can stop the coming apocalypse is you, your friends and a deck of cards.

STOP THE SUMMONING

  • Turn-based strategy

    No-one said taking on the forces of darkness was going to be easy. Your choices will affect the outcome for the whole team, so make each turn count.

  • Beat the Odds

    To locate and destroy the ritual altars, you’ll need to use helpful items such as charms, first aid kits and hatchets wisely. Careless play will lead you straight into danger, with evil cultists and the demon itself ready to take you down when you give them the chance.

  • Who’s your hero?
    Choose a character card to represent yourself as you pursue victory against the cult.

FEATURES

  • 1-4 player online co-op
    Take control of up to 4 characters in this unique online co-op experience.  

  • Single player mode
    For the solo demon banisher! In this mode, you’ll control all 4 characters and face the cult alone. 

  • Replayability
    With fast and challenging gameplay, each unique playthrough of DEMONS is guaranteed to present interesting and thought-provoking choices that will vary every time. 

  • Unlock rewards
    As you play, you’ll have the opportunity to unlock cosmetic rewards that you can use to customise your game board. Unlockable perk cards are also available - they will enhance your gameplay and give you and your team extra strategic options to help you win.

  • Immerse yourself
    Delve into a unique co-op experience with stunning original art, music and sound effects.

Warning

This game contains flashing lights that may make it unsuitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions. Player discretion is advised.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish, Russian, Simplified Chinese
